Uses of Class
org.jscience.social.history.time.Time

Packages that use Time
Package
Description
org.jscience.social.history.clock
Provides the org.jscience.social.history.time module.

  • Uses of Time in org.jscience.social.history.clock

    Subclasses of Time in org.jscience.social.history.clock
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    ChineseTime
    Represents Traditional Chinese Time.
    class 
    DecimalTime
    Represents time using a decimal system (10h/100m/100s per day).
    class 
    HexadecimalTime
    Represents Hexadecimal Time (16h per day, 16 maximes per hour, 16 minutes per maxime, 16 seconds per minute).
    class 
    InternetTime
    Represents Swatch Internet Time, dividing the day into 1000 ".beats".
    class 
    ModernTime
    Standard representation of time using the Gregorian/Modern system (24h/60m/60s).
    Methods in org.jscience.social.history.clock that return Time
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    abstract Time
    Clock.getTime()
    Returns the current time representation held by this clock.
    Time
    TimeEvent.getTime()
    Returns the time associated with the event.

    Constructor
    Description
